name: Indigo and Orange (Wanted POV)
description:
In the streets of Gaine Town, you're wanted. And they will stop at nothing to catch you and have you answer for your crimes.

Thank you for clicking on. Please remember to give me your honest review. If there's anything about this bot you'd want me to change or if you have suggestions for future bots, let a novice know 😉.
creator: Jud Kunokin
